use_cases: Form submission triggers for user actions
Icon buttons for toolbars and action bars
Destructive action confirmations with variant styling
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Features multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with accessible focus states and disabled handling. Designed as an atomic UI primitive for any application requiring interactive form controls.
